title: Deployment & DevOps
description: Hosting, env vars, CI/CD, domains, and DNS
longDescription: Building an app is only half the battle — getting it live on the internet is the other half. Deployment is where 'works on my machine' becomes 'works for everyone'. Just like launching a rocket, you need checklists, staging environments, and a plan for when things go sideways. This course covers everything from environment variables and hosting platforms to CI/CD pipelines, domains, DNS, and what to do when your deploy breaks at 2am.
